---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Dorin2017
---

## Project Focus

This project analyzes 5,000 Brexit-related social media comments to understand how political identity shapes online discussion, participation patterns, and engagement.

## Topic

Political communication and interaction patterns in Brexit discussions on social media.

## Data

The dataset includes:\
- Comment tone scores\
- Political identity (Brexiteer, Remainer, Unknown)\
- Like-minded vs cross-cutting discussion\
- Comment engagement (reactions)\
- Comment structure (standalone vs replies)

## Plan

The project involved:\
- Cleaning and preparing the data in R\
- Creating multiple visualization versions\
- Improving design and clarity of plots\
- Writing short interpretations\
- Publishing results as a Quarto website

## Author

Nishat Parvez \
PhD Candidate, University of Oregon \
EDLD 652 Data Visualization Project
